Video.summary: A Hollywood star racing to fund his dream film finds himself battling a ruthless gang determined to shut down the production.
Video.title: Hollywood Man

Video.summary: Three directors. Three unique styles. Three incredible legacies.
Video.grandparentTitle: Scorsese, Leone, and Larry Cohen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the classic films of William Friedkin, Brian De Palma, and John Carpenter.
Video.grandparentTitle: Friedkin, De Palma, and Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this TFH exclusive, director Allan Arkush takes you inside cult classic The Final Comedown (a.k.a. Blast).
Video.title: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Image.alt: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush
The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Celebrating the bold storytelling, unforgettable characters, and cultural impact of Black cinema.
Video.grandparentTitle: Rebels, Icons, and Revolution: A Journey Through Black Cinema
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.grandparentTitle: Eli Roth's Shock and Awe
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vintage Vixens & Exploitation Classics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Action legend Fred Williamson directs and stars in this crime drama about a down-on-his-luck veteran who must choose sides when rival Mafia factions go to war in the streets.
Video.title: Mean Johnny Barrows

Video.summary: A black actor’s dream of making a movie becomes a nightmare when he’s forced to borrow money from local gangsters. Calvin Lockhart headlined this 1977 blaxploitation classic on the heels of “Let’s Do It Again” and “Uptown Saturday Night.”
Video.title: The Baron

Video.summary: These heist and detective classics explore the moral ambiguity and dark psychology of the criminal underworld.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 1: The Criminal Code
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's an action bonanza of cops, robbers, and vengeance in these crime and exploitation hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 2: Grit and Glory
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Betrayal, justice, and moral complexity are on the menu in these moody and violent crime flicks.
Video.grandparentTitle: Crime Doesn't Pay Vol. 3: The Dark Side of Justice
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "Bonnie and Clyde" to "The Royal Tenenbaums," these are the movies that made Gene Hackman a Hollywood legend.
Video.grandparentTitle: Gene Hackman's Greatest Hits
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Five films. One legacy. Here's why Clint Eastwood's Harry Callahan is a Hollywood legend.
Video.grandparentTitle: Go Ahead, Make My Day
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Shaft to Coffy to Truck Turner and more, celebrating the best action films of the Blaxploitation genre.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best of Blaxploitation
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lola Falana stars as a mob moll who finds herself in the crosshairs of killers when she agrees to testify against her boyfriend.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lady Cocoa
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers discuss the action, resilience, and cultural impact of Black cinema throughout the decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Cinematic Soul: Black Stories in Film
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From socially charged dramas to alternate realities, these are the films that defined decades of Black culture.
Video.grandparentTitle: Legends of Black Cinema: Stories That Break the System
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step inside a world of streetwise anti-heroes, rebels, and genre-defining Black filmmakers who did things their own way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Street Kings: Icons, Outlaws, and Originals
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers look back at the movies influenced by famous literary works.
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dive deeper into the classic books that became Hollywood blockbusters!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Stephen King to Kurt Vonnegut, Hollywood brings your favorite books to the big screen!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: High school misfits, teenage rebels, and coming-of-age chaos straight out of Hollywood.
Video.grandparentTitle: Locker Rooms & Leather Jackets
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Great American Best Pictures
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From timeless romance to twisted love stories, Hollywood holds the key to our hearts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Falling In Love with Trailers from Hell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Music documentaries and films that crank the volume with chaos, classic sounds, and more.
Video.grandparentTitle: Turn It Up: Rock Docs & Amped-Up Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From classic stories to beloved biopics, these movies celebrate the magic of music on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Symphonic Stories
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Audiences have loved seeing their favorite music stars on screen. Here are some greatest hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Music Legends On the Big Screen
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the stars, stories, and iconic music moments that have audiences singing in their seats.
Video.grandparentTitle: Classic Concert Films
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: ‘Shaft,” and “Foxy Brown” all rolled out to the “Car Wash” with “Sweet Sweetbacks Badasss Song” on the radio!
Video.grandparentTitle: Trailers From Hell
Video.title: Bad Ass Blaxploitation
